stance: Risk-on, momentum-led: rotate the book out of dead-momentum mega-caps into high-conviction momentum + rising-revision mid/small names within the theme, while keeping the structural consumption winners that still have strong analyst support.
experience_note: This is round one (no graded track to learn from yet), so this book is a pre-registered momentum-led tilt. I am watching three things that would change my mind next round: (1) whether the high-z_mom mid/smalls I am adding actually deliver positive active return vs NIFTY 500, or whether I simply bought crowded momentum that mean-reverts; (2) whether my conviction-IC is positive — i.e. did the names I sized biggest (STLTECH, MTARTECH) outperform the names I sized small; (3) whether cutting the defensive mega-caps (HDFCBANK, ITC, MARUTI) hurts me in a risk-off tape — if the market rotates to quality/defensives, my beta-1.05, momentum-tilted book will lag and I will need to re-add ballast. If momentum breaks and revisions roll over together, I de-risk back toward the structural consumption core.
